texto: Morocco has a lot to do in terms of democracy. The daily practice of democracy evolves in time. Trying to apply a Western democratic system to a country of the Maghreb, the Middle East, or the Gulf would be a mistake. We are not Germany, Sweden or Spain.
explicacao: Citação de Mohammed VI of Morocco sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Morocco has a lot to do in terms of democracy. The daily practice of democracy evolves in time.
